A-Share Midday: ChiNext Rebounds 0.21%; Lab-Grown Diamonds, Supercapacitors Lead Gains

At the close of the morning session, China’s domestic futures most-active contracts were mixed: Shanghai silver (SHFE) fell more than 4%, platinum fell nearly 4%, palladium fell over 3% and Shanghai gold fell nearly 3%; urea, Shanghai aluminum, Shanghai nickel and Shanghai tin each lost more than 1%. On the upside, PTA gained nearly 3%; p-xylene, coke, short fiber and coking coal rose more than 2%; bottle-grade PET chips, PVC and rapeseed oil rose nearly 2%.

ChiNext Index moved into positive territory approaching the midday break after earlier dropping as much as 1.8%; Shenzhen Composite Index's loss narrowed to 0.36%, while the Shanghai Composite fell 0.21%.
